title: sideritis spinosa var. subspinosa
intro: Sideritis spinosa var. subspinosa, also known as Greek mountain tea or ironwort, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sideritis spinosa var. subspinosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sideritis spinosa var. subspinosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its potential medicinal benefits.
